title: LIMIT/OFFSET backfill — O(n²) degradation on large table backfill
expected_feedback: Standard: LIMIT/OFFSET backfill degrades to O(n²) on large tables. At offset 10M, MySQL scans and discards 10M rows per batch. Use PK-range batching instead: WHERE id > @last_id AND id <= @last_id + @batch_size.
